references.text: Jessop, JP. 1979. Liliaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 9: 189-235

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser & Jiro Adorador, 28 July 2022

species.citation: Stapf , Trans. Linn. Soc. London, Bot. 4 (1894) 240 ; Jessop, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1979) 230. = Metanarthecium brachyphyllum (Merr.) Masam. , Bull. Soc. Bot. France 84 (1937) 18; ≡ Liriope brachyphylla Merr. , PJS 2c (1907) 266 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 206; Type: Merrill 5710 (NY, US, iso), Mindoro: Mindoro Oriental, Mt Halcon, seepage slopes in open heath, c. 2400m, Nov-1906.
species.notes: Liriope brachyphylla Merr. is doubtfully reduced to this species by Jessop (1979). 2000-3450m.

species.citation: (Thunb.) Franch. , J. Bot. (Morot), 1st Sér. 10 (1896) 199 ; Merrill, EPFP 1 (1923) 207; Jessop, Fl. Males. ser. 1, 9 (1979) 232; ≡ Hypoxis spicata Thunb. , Syst. Veg., 14th Ed. (1784) 326.
species.distribution: China, Japan, Korea, Philippines, Ryukyu Isls, Taiwan. LUZON: Abra, Benguet, Mountain Province.
species.notes: Among grasses above , usually in pine forest, but often in open places. Fl. Jan-Dec. (1000-)1600-2300(-?)m.
